sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking on the slot (36,34) had no impact either. This is strange - in level 1, clicking a slot after selecting a color worked. But here nothing happens. Let me reconsider the interaction model.
Maybe the interaction is different in level 2. Perhaps I need to:
1. Click a slot first to select it
2. Then click a color to fill it
Or maybe the interaction is completely different. Let me look at the board more carefully. The bottom row shows gray placeholders and colored squares. Maybe I need to drag colors to slots, or the interaction is different.
Wait - looking at the bottom row in the image, I see: gray, gray, gray, magenta, gray, yellow. So magenta and yellow are already "placed" at the bottom? No, those are the source colors.
Actually, let me reconsider. In level 1, I clicked bottom colors then clicked slots. Here, selecting a bottom color (clicking at row 58) was HUD-only. And clicking a slot was also no impact.
Maybe the interaction model is different. Perhaps I need to click the slot first, then the color? Or maybe I need to use a different action altogether?
Let me try clicking a slot first, then a color.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model updated: Clicking slots directly has no impact. The interaction model may be different from level 1. Need to probe.
Plan: Try clicking a slot first, then a color. Or try ACTION7.

])
